weka.filters.unsupervised.attribute

Class KideraFactors

  • java.lang.Object
    • weka.filters.Filter
      • weka.filters.SimpleFilter
        • weka.filters.SimpleStreamFilter
          • weka.filters.unsupervised.attribute.AminoAcidFilter
            • weka.filters.unsupervised.attribute.KideraFactors
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    java.io.Serializable, weka.core.CapabilitiesHandler, weka.core.CapabilitiesIgnorer, weka.core.CommandlineRunnable, weka.core.OptionHandler, weka.core.RevisionHandler, weka.filters.StreamableFilter

    public class KideraFactors
extends AminoAcidFilter
    Sum of Kidera factors across amino acids in a protein sequence. Optionally scales sum by the length of the sequence.

    Valid options are: 

     -R <index>
  Sets the index of the string attribute.
 
     -S
  Scales counts to sum to unity.
    See Also:
    Serialized Form
